name: idea-incubation-review
description: Initial research + viability verdict for a raw idea against 999's internal incubation criteria — fan out three analysts (buildability, market/adoption, business), then score against the Pre-Presentation Rulebook (20-item) and the Idea Incubation Operating Model (page-09/10 scorecard) with a software-first hard gate. Answers buildable-per-docs? and viable-per-rulebook?, classifies Commercial vs Internal track, lists gaps and missing presenter deliverables. Works with zero setup; a connected Confluence-reader MCP freshens criteria and flags drift.
